items.title: From raw x to polynomial features to linear regression
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  rawX["input x"] --> scale["StandardScaler"]
  scale --> expand["PolynomialFeatures"]
  expand --> design["design matrix: 1, x, x^2, ..."]
  design --> ols["LinearRegression / Ridge"]
  ols --> yhat["predicted y_hat"]
items.caption: Polynomial regression is a feature-expansion step followed by the same linear regression solver you already know.

items.title: Underfit vs good fit vs overfit by degree
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  d1["degree 1: straight line"] --> under["underfits curved data"]
  d3["degree 3: smooth curve"] --> good["matches signal"]
  d9["degree 9: wiggly curve"] --> over["tracks noise between points"]
items.caption: Low degree misses curvature; moderate degree captures the trend; very high degree interpolates noise and fails on new data.
